creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Mon Jan  6 02:38:03 2014
New Revision: 338837
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338837

Log:
  - Update from 0.8.5 to 0.8.8
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/185348
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Deleted:
  head/sysutils/ftwin/files/patch-ftwin.c
Modified:
  head/sysutils/ftwin/Makefile
  head/sysutils/ftwin/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/ftwin/files/patch-acinclude-check-cflags-ldflags   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/ftwin/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ftwin/Makefile	Mon Jan  6 01:17:01 2014	(r338836)
+++ head/sysutils/ftwin/Makefile	Mon Jan  6 02:38:03 2014	(r338837)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ftwin
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.5
-PORTREVISION=	11
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.8
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://files.etoilebsd.net/ftwin/ \
 		http://download.meroware.org/ftwin/
@@ -10,24 +9,33 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://files.etoilebsd.net
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Useful tool to find duplicate files
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	libpuzzle.so:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/libpuzzle \
-		libapr-1.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/apr1 \
-		libpcre.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pcre
+LICENSE=	APACHE20
+
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libapr-1.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/apr1 \
+		libpcre.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pcre \
+		libpuzzle.so:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/libpuzzle
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
-GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-USE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf aclocal automake autoheader
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=	aclocal autoheader automake autoconf
 AUTOMAKE_ARGS=	--add-missing
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-puzzle=${LOCALBASE}
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/ftwin \
-		man/man8/ftwin.8.gz
 
-PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS EXAMPLES TODO CHANGES KNOWN_BUGS VERSION LICENSE README
+CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
+
+PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS EXAMPLES TODO CHANGES KNOWN_BUGS VERSION README
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/ftwin man/man8/ftwin.8.gz
+
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|-Werror -g -ggdb|| ; \
+		 s|-O0||' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.am
 
 post-install:
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
-	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+.for i in ${PORTDOCS}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${i} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
+.endfor
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/sysutils/ftwin/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ftwin/distinfo	Mon Jan  6 01:17:01 2014	(r338836)
+++ head/sysutils/ftwin/distinfo	Mon Jan  6 02:38:03 2014	(r338837)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ftwin-0.8.5.tar.bz2) = 03dec36503b3c781f287b4427e99d9d1ccc704f1d9e11eadcd630e4c29dea0ce
-SIZE (ftwin-0.8.5.tar.bz2) = 164234
+SHA256 (ftwin-0.8.8.tar.bz2) = 78ba3c70acc48cbe86a653a15d91ae8e194d6bfd4f9baefc9fd27fa697b2435e
+SIZE (ftwin-0.8.8.tar.bz2) = 168461

Modified: head/sysutils/ftwin/files/patch-acinclude-check-cflags-ldflags
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ftwin/files/patch-acinclude-check-cflags-ldflags	Mon Jan  6 01:17:01 2014	(r338836)
+++ head/sysutils/ftwin/files/patch-acinclude-check-cflags-ldflags	Mon Jan  6 02:38:03 2014	(r338837)
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
---- ./acinclude.m4.orig	2008-11-03 18:03:37.000000000 +0100
-+++ ./acinclude.m4	2009-06-08 11:04:57.456599653 +0200
+--- acinclude.m4.orig	2013-12-18 05:14:54.000000000 +0900
++++ acinclude.m4	2013-12-18 05:16:15.000000000 +0900
 @@ -141,8 +141,8 @@
      ])
  
@@ -11,30 +11,7 @@
                    [
                        HAVE_CHECK=yes
                        ], 
-@@ -173,9 +173,11 @@
- 	    # Make sure we have "puzzle.h".  If we don't, it means we probably
- 	    # don't have libpuzzle, so don't use it.
- 	    #
-+	    CPPFLAGS="$CPPFLAGS -I$puzzle/include"
- 	    AC_CHECK_HEADER(puzzle.h,
- 		[
- 		# Check if the lib is OK
-+		LDFLAGS="$LDFLAGS -L$puzzle/lib"
- 		AC_CHECK_LIB(puzzle, puzzle_init_context,
- 		    [
- 		     AC_DEFINE([HAVE_PUZZLE], 1, [for image comparison mode])
-@@ -216,16 +218,18 @@
- 	    # Make sure we have "archive.h".  If we don't, it means we probably
- 	    # don't have libarchive, so don't use it.
- 	    #
-+	    CPPFLAGS="$CPPFLAGS -I$archive/include"
- 	    AC_CHECK_HEADER(archive.h,
- 		[
- 		# Check if the lib is OK
-+		LDFLAGS="$LDFLAGS -L$archive/lib -lmd -lcrypto"
- 		AC_CHECK_LIB(archive, archive_version,
- 		    [
- 		     AC_DEFINE([HAVE_ARCHIVE], 1, [for inside archive comparison mode])
+@@ -225,7 +225,7 @@
  		     with_archive=yes
  		     ARCHIVE_CPPFLAGS="-I$archive/include"
  		     ARCHIVE_LDFLAGS="-L$archive/lib"
_______________________________________________
